arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer to be made OFFICIAL in next 48 hours
arts.sum: Vitor Roque has been the subject of tremendous speculation since arriving at Camp Nou 13 months ago, with his brief and forgettable spell with the Blaugrana set to be brought to an abrupt end as Palmeiras close in on his signature. Sport reports that ‘Tigrinho’ is set to complete a €25m move back to Palmeiras by Monday, with the deal entering its decisive phase ahead of the close of the Brazilian transfer window on 28 February.

arts.ttl: Juventus need Champions League for transfer battle with Inter and Barcelona
arts.sum: Juventus are among the clubs interested in signing Canada star Jonathan David as a free...

Another LaLiga match is just around the corner, but today saw the Champions League draw to decide the route to the final in Munich on 31 May. Barça are to face Benfica in the last 16 and then Dortmund or Lille in a potential quarterfinal. League leaders Barça travel to Las Palmas in week 25 of La Liga aiming to retain top spot ahead of rivals Real Madrid and Atlético Madrid.
